settings.heroDescription: As we close this chapter and begin new journeys, let's celebrate the friendships, lessons, and memories that shaped us.
settings.quoteText: "Don't cry because it's over, smile because it happened. The memories we made will last a lifetime."
settings.footerDesc: Where futures are built and memories are made.
settings.footerMadeBy: Made with ♥ by the Batch of 2025

teachers.name: Mrs.Shilpa Sethi
teachers.subject: Principal.
teachers.quote: Step forward with confidence, chase your dreams with determination, and remember that our blessings and good wishes will always accompany you on every path you choose.

teachers.name: Mrs.Deepta
teachers.subject: Vice Principal.
teachers.quote: Behind you, all your memories. Before you, all your dreams & a world waiting for your light. Around you, all who love you. As you leave this school, carry your roots with pride and let your wings take you to horizons yet unseen. & As you step out to write your next chapter, remember that you will always have a home here at Cornerstone.

teachers.name: Mr.Venkat
teachers.subject: Mathematics HOD.
teachers.quote:
Dear students,
This day marks an important milestone in your lives. The knowledge, values and experiences you gained here will always be your foundation for your next journey.
Success is not only measured in marks but by the effort you put in, the courage you show and the character you build along the way. Dream big, stay focused and never stop learning. Your teachers and school will always be proud of you. 
Wishing you success, happiness and endless opportunities ahead.

teachers.name: Mrs.Ancy Thomas.
teachers.subject: Social Science HOD.
teachers.quote:
You came here with tiny bags and big dreams—and handwriting we could barely read. Today you leave with bigger dreams… and handwriting we still can’t read! 

Go make the world proud—and don’t forget this place where it all began.

teachers.name: Mrs.Pragya
teachers.subject: Hindi HOD.
teachers.quote:
जीवन आपको चाहे जहाँ भी ले जाए, याद रखें कि आपके शिक्षक आप पर विश्वास करते हैं। अपना हौसला बुलंद रखें और अपने सपनों को देखना कभी न छोड़ें!
 "चलते-चलते मेरे ये गीत याद रखना, कभी अलविदा ना कहना!"

teachers.name: Mrs. Rashmi
teachers.subject: Hindi
teachers.quote:
हमें आप पर गर्व है।
आपकी मेहनत, अनुशासन और सपने आपको नई ऊँचाइयों तक ले जाएँगे।
हमेशा सीखते रहिए, अच्छे इंसान बनिए और अपने माता-पिता व स्कूल का नाम रोशन कीजिए।
आप सभी के उज्ज्वल भविष्य के लिए मेरी ढेर सारी शुभकामनाएँ

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: We started this journey together, full of hope and excitement for what lay ahead.

timeline.title: Virtual Bonds
timeline.description: Despite the challenges, we stayed connected and grew closer through screens.

timeline.title: Reunion
timeline.description: Back together again, stronger than ever. The halls echoed with our laughter once more.

timeline.title: Growth & Discovery
timeline.description: Finding our passions, building our dreams, and creating unforgettable memories.

timeline.title: Final Chapter
timeline.description: Our last year together, making every moment count before we say goodbye.

timeline.title: New Beginnings
timeline.description: As we close this chapter, new adventures await. Forever Cornerstone!
